basics.title: Tushe
basics.country_hint: Yana shafar kuɗi da ma'auni a cikin manhaja

privacy.title: Sirri
privacy.friends_only_desc: Mutanen da ka haɗa da su ne kawai za su iya ganin bayanan ka.
privacy.everyone_desc: Kowa a Mingla zai iya samun ka kuma ya ga bayanan ka.
privacy.nobody_desc: Ba ka ganuwa. Ba kowa zai iya ganin bayanan ka — cikakken yanayin ɓoye.
privacy.show_activity_on: Abokai za su iya ganin abin da kake yi.
privacy.show_activity_off: An ɓoye aikin ka daga kowa.

notifications.title: Saitin Sanarwa
notifications.push_hint: Karɓi sanarwar push a na'urar ka
notifications.friends_pairing_hint: Buƙatun abokai, buƙatun haɗawa, da sabuntawa na zamantakewa
notifications.link_requests_hint: Lokacin da wani yake son haɗa bayanan shi da naka
notifications.messages_hint: Saƙonni kai tsaye da hirarraki na zama
notifications.sessions_hint: Gayyatoci, sabuntawa na mambobi, da ayyukan hukuma
notifications.tips_hint: Tunatarwa, labarai na mako-mako, da shawarwari

quiet_hours.title: Lokutan Natsuwa
quiet_hours.label: Lokutan Natsuwa
quiet_hours.messages_hint: Kyale saƙonni kai tsaye tsakanin 10 PM - 8 AM
quiet_hours.error_update: An kasa sabunta saitin lokutan natsuwa.

delete.title: Yankin Haɗari
delete.warning: Wannan zai share bayanan ka, hukumominka, da tarihin ka har abada. Babu maido.
delete.confirm_body: Share asusun ka zai cire komai — bayanan ka, hukumomi, haɗuwa, da ayyuka. Ba za a iya juya wannan ba.
delete.deleting_title: Mun ji daɗin ganin ka na tafiya
delete.deleting_body: Ana ɗaukar kayanka ana share ƙasa.
delete.deleting_sub: Wannan yana ɗaukar lokaci. Ɗan jira.
delete.success_body: Koyaushe kana maraba. Za mu bar fitila a kunna.
delete.success_sub: Ana fitar da kai yanzu. Sai mun sake haɗuwa.
delete.error_default: Wani abu bai yi daidai ba. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
delete.error_must_sign_in: Dole ne ka shiga don share asusun ka.
delete.error_timeout: Wannan yana ɗaukar lokaci fiye da yadda ake tsammani. Asusun ka wataƙila an riga an share shi — gwada rufe kuma sake buɗe manhaja.

pickers.invalid_date: Ranar da ba ta dace ba
pickers.birthday_future: Ranar haihuwa ba za ta kasance a gaba ba.

country_confirm_body: Canjawa zuwa {{country}} zai sabunta kuɗin ka zuwa {{currency}} ({{symbol}}) da ma'aunin zuwa {{measurement}}. Ci gaba?
error_update: An kasa sabuntawa. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
